title: helenium angustifolium
intro: Helenium angustifolium, also known as narrow-leaved sneezeweed, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and narrow leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone compounds. The health benefits of Helenium angustifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Helenium angustifolium is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used topically in salves and creams to utilize its medicinal properties.
